options.name: -batchMode
options.description: if several instances are specified, clone them all with no timing update in between

options.name: -force
options.description: force instance cloning, even if it worsens QoR.

options.name: -instances
options.description: list of instances to clone (wildcards allowed)

options.name: -max_num_loads
options.description: skip cloning instances driving more than these many loads. Default 50000.

options.name: -numClones
options.description: specifies how many clones to have in the end

options.name: -radius
options.description: place clones within a radius of <num> rows from its preferred location based on original instance location and center of mass of new set of loads. Default 10.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: display extra information about what is going on
